title: rostraria salzmannii subsp. cossoniana
intro: Rostraria salzmannii subsp. cossoniana, also known as bent or curly grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rostraria salzmannii subsp. cossoniana include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
